message:
beads: file ydn1e (fwc pipeline_dispatch stale dead_code attribute, P3)

Reality-check audit of 5 fwc CLI subcommands against README claims
(list, history, invoke, pipeline, introspect). Zero overclaims found
in the 4 documented-and-implemented subcommands. The 5th, `fwc
introspect`, is not claimed in README and not implemented — consistent.

Single concrete improvement opportunity surfaced:
crates/fwc/src/main.rs:20761 marks pipeline_dispatch with
  #[allow(dead_code)] // Wired when host integration lands.
but the function IS called from main.rs:3242 (the Commands::Pipeline
match arm). The attribute is stale and the comment actively misleads
anyone grepping for unfinished surfaces.

Full audit evidence (file:line for each of the 4 subcommands' args
structs, global --format/--json backing, introspect non-claim) is
captured in the bead body so the fix doesn't need to re-audit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
